articles.title: AI MONETIZATION PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: Metronome provides billing infrastructure for OpenAI, Databricks, and Confluent; they know a thing or two about modern pricing models. They've collated that knowledge into the Monetization Operating Model, [4] which offers a roadmap to sustainable and flexible pricing for the

articles.title: current age of AI-driven value. Read the full whitepaper (ungated)
ETHICS IN AI: THE NEW FRONTIER FOR PRODUCT MANAGERS
articles.summary: AI is forcing product managers to add a fourth axis - ethics - alongside feasibility, desirability, and viability. Embedding responsibility into discovery, roadmaps, and definitions of “done” builds trust, prevents scandals, and creates lasting competitive advantage.

articles.title: THE TOP 100 GEN AI CONSUMER APPS
articles.summary: The Gen AI consumer app ecosystem is stabilizing, with fewer newcomers but rising traction in vibe coding and Chinese-developed apps. ChatGPT leads, but Gemini, Grok, and Perplexity are rapidly gaining ground.

articles.title: OPENAI'S PRODUCT LEADER SHARES 5 PHASES TO BUILD, DEPLOY, AND SCALE YOUR AI PRODUCT STRATEGY FROM SCRATCH
articles.summary: Winning AI products hinge on moats - data, distribution, trust - plus workflow-centered differentiation and cost-aware design with guardrails. Scale via controlled pilots, compounding feedback loops, and leadership that institutionalizes ROI-driven experimentation.

articles.title: THE CONTEXT LAYER
articles.summary: The universal metrics layer failed not due to technical issues but because it was unsellable without applications. AI agents may face the same challenge: they could work best as independent specialists, but business realities may keep them tied to apps.

articles.title: THE PRODUCT DISCOVERY METHOD THAT TAKES MINUTES, NOT MONTHS
articles.summary: PMs often face overwhelming, conflicting demands without the time for proper discovery. Success comes from structuring problem analysis, leveraging AI to accelerate discovery, and maintaining strategic leadership over reactive execution.

articles.title: NEW NEUROSCIENCE REVEALS 4 SECRETS THAT WILL MAKE YOU EMOTIONALLY INTELLIGENT
articles.summary: Emotions guide us, but they don't have to control us. Simple tools - sensation, self-talk, time shifts, environment, and the right friends - help restore balance.

articles.title: THE RISE OF COMPUTER USE AND AGENTIC COWORKERS
articles.summary: Computer-using AI agents represent a major leap beyond RPA, enabling end-to-end digital workflows across legacy and modern tools. Startups that master contextualization and vertical specialization will define the first wave of true agentic coworkers.

articles.title: CHICKENS TALKING TO DUCKS
articles.summary: Miscommunication often arises when reassurance and support are expressed in different “languages.” Effective leadership and partnership require asking what support looks like and adapting communication to meet others' needs.

articles.title: DISCOVERY COLLABORATION IS ABOUT SKILLS, NOT TITLES
articles.summary: Focus on skills: upskill what you can, outsource what you can't, and be clear about what you drop - then lean into your team's unfair advantages.

articles.title: EXECUTION ISN'T JUST SPEED
articles.summary: Great execution isn't speed or checklists - it's the ability to adapt, question assumptions, and spot when progress drifts into theater.
